title: Episode 1: The Awakening
description: The journey begins, warriors of innovation rise.

title: Episode 2: Gates of Destiny
description: The gates close, only the chosen remain.

title: Episode 3: Trials of the Mind
description: Ideas are forged in the heat of judgment.

title: Episode 4: Rise of the Chosen
description: The final contenders emerge from the shadows.

title: Episode 5: The Mentor’s Forge
description: Masters shape the warriors for the ultimate battle.

title: Final Episode: The Grand Convergence
description: The final clash decides the champions of Technologia.
